positive: Minimalist celestial animal silhouette, a graceful arctic fox leaping through a constellation pattern of geometric nebulae and flowing cosmic dust. The fox is rendered with crisp, solid black lines against a deep indigo and sapphire gradient background. The composition is perfectly centered, focusing on the dynamic pose and clean edges of the subject. Include subtle geometric starburst accents and stylized crescent moon elements integrated into the background void. Style: Modern vector art, clean graphic design, high contrast, suitable for direct screen printing on dark fabric. Lighting: Flat, evenly diffused studio lighting.
negative: photorealistic, blurry, noisy, watermark, text, signature, messy, poor quality, artifacts, low detail, grain, extra limbs, poor anatomy
